brand.name: ТВОЙ ХОД
brand.logoAlt: ТВОЙ ХОД. Finances as a game

meta.title: ТВОЙ ХОД — finances as a game
meta.description: Telegram Mini App: learn money management through timed periods, choices, and consequences — with coach Monetka, in a safe sandbox.

hero.subtitle: Play through simulated “months”: a timer, decisions, events, and period close — zero risk to your real wallet. Coach Monetka helps you get started.
hero.monetkaQuote: I'm Monetka — I'll help you read the numbers without panic.
hero.monetkaBubble: Watch cash and your safety fund — they're honest

how.title: The loop in one minute
how.subtitle: One game month = limited time + explicit actions + period close with consequences.

steps.title: The period runs
steps.text: A countdown sets the pace. Pause keeps progress — no need to stare at the screen for hours.

steps.title: You decide
steps.text: Salary on tap, safety fund, capital, choice events — each action moves the balance.

steps.title: The month closes
steps.text: Debt payments, overdue amounts, asset income, insurance premiums and investments. Mistakes sting but stay educational.

steps.title: Next period
steps.text: Up to three events per month, analytics snapshots, and victory checks — no win before period seven.

features.title: Inside a run
features.subtitle: Unified server-side economy: UI numbers match period-close math.

items.title: Period & timer
items.text: A game month with pause and “next” — life-like rhythm in a safe sandbox.

items.title: Salary & safety fund
items.text: Income only on tap each period; safety fund is separate from cash and part of victory rules.

items.title: Capital management
items.text: Assets and liabilities from templates: income, upkeep, payments and overdue — clear, not jargon-heavy.

items.title: Choice events
items.text: Up to three situations per period — consequences, not a “pick the quiz answer” test.

items.title: Investments & insurance
items.text: Deposits, bonds, and policies: capitalization and premiums at period close in a simplified life model.

items.title: Goals & analytics
items.text: Dashboard, victory step chain, and period-close charts — see where the run is heading.

learn.title: What the simulation teaches
learn.subtitle: Not a slide course — a habit of thinking about money through outcomes.

cards.title: Safety fund
cards.text: Why to save when cash feels tight, and how it ties to obligations.

cards.title: Obligations
cards.text: Payments and overdue — clear, without “get rich in a week” toxicity.

cards.title: Events
cards.text: Choices with consequences: sometimes there is no perfect option, only trade-offs.

cards.title: Discipline
cards.text: Income doesn't auto-deposit — miss an action in a period, and it shows.

cards.title: Capital
cards.text: Assets earn but cost upkeep; debt is not an abstract number.

cards.title: Risk & buffer
cards.text: Insurance and investments in simplified form — understand trade-offs, not memorize terms.

peek.title: In-game UI
peek.subtitle: MQX layer on Telegram: one visual language across dashboard, finance, and events.

panels.label: Dashboard
panels.title: Period & goal
panels.text: Timer, salary, safety fund, and victory steps — on one screen.

panels.label: Capital
panels.title: Period finances
panels.text: Income, expenses, investments, insurance, property, and liabilities — accordions without clutter.

panels.label: Events
panels.title: Decision carousel
panels.text: Compact choice cards; Monetka helps you read the situation, not replace it.

coach.title: Monetka — your coach
coach.lead: Not a bank bot or “app voice”. Short hints where first glance is hard.
points: On sign-in and new run — who Monetka is and what to do next.
On the dashboard — how to read period finances and why obligations matter.
In capital — what you can buy, open, and close without extra noise.
In goals — victory steps in plain language, without lecturing.

modes.title: Two save modes
modes.subtitle: One brand and MQX — different ways to start a run.

game.title: Game
game.text: Quick start from scenario templates — no manual setup of every parameter upfront.
points: Template sets opening balance, lifestyle, and difficulty
Events and economy filtered for game mode
MVP victory: safety fund, obligations, cashflow

plan.title: Plan
plan.text: Your scenario and conscious “what if” — input wizard and prefill in development.

victory.title: Run goal
victory.subtitle: Victory isn't a guess: rules are visible in finance overview; no win in the first six periods — time to learn.
points: Safety fund ≥ 3× monthly obligations (debt payments + asset upkeep)
Net monthly cashflow is not negative
Win counts from period seven — early luck doesn't skip the lesson

partners.title: Partners & investors
partners.subtitle: ТВОЙ ХОД is edutainment in Telegram: short sessions, growing content, mascot Monetka, and a clear learning frame.

points.title: Market
points.text: Financial literacy for ages 14–35: gaming habits plus demand for useful, non-dry learning.

points.title: Product
points.text: Period core loop, starter templates, events, capital, investments and insurance — unified server-side economy.

points.title: Monetization
points.text: Game / Plan modes, difficulty templates, expandable content — details on request.

points.title: Compliance
points.text: Educational simulation, not investment advice; tone without scare tactics or predatory lending glam.

items.a: No. All amounts and operations live inside the game simulation.
ТВОЙ ХОД's in-game coach: short hints at start, on the dashboard, in capital, and in goals. She doesn't make decisions for you.
A typical visit is a few minutes; a full run spans several game “months” as interest grows.
Yes. Three periods in a row with negative cash — game over. It's part of learning: outcomes show in numbers.
Safety fund ≥ 3× obligations, no overdue, non-negative cashflow — and not before period seven. Details in finance overview.
No. The product is educational; real-life decisions are yours alone.

items.q: When can I try it on Telegram?
items.a: Public Mini App launch is in preparation; this site does not link to the bot yet.

ctaBand.title: Ready for your first move?
ctaBand.text: Telegram launch is in preparation — explore the mechanics here for now.

footer.legal: Not individual investment advice. A learning simulation.
